overview.description: Your workspace's security posture at a glance. Jump into any area below.

threatProtection.title: Threat Protection
threatProtection.description: Bot detection, anomalies, rate limits and IP allowlists.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.description: Active sessions across the workspace — revoke any you don't recognise.

deviceAuthorizations.title: Device Authorizations
deviceAuthorizations.description: Devices that completed the device-authorization flow.

rateLimits.title: Rate Limits
rateLimits.description: Per-endpoint gateway limits and tenant network policy.

auditLogs.title: Audit Logs
auditLogs.description: Hash-chained, append-only record of every security event.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.description: SOC 2, GDPR, ISO 27001 and data-retention controls.

sessions.description: Every active and revoked session for your account. Revoking a session terminates the refresh token immediately.

auditLogs.description: Every state-changing event in this tenant, written atomically with the underlying business row.

list.title: Events
list.empty: No events match your filters yet.

auditIntelligence.description: Behavioral-baseline anomaly detection over the audit log: a first-time action type, an unusual hour, or a new IP for an admin's own history. Distinct from Threat Protection's Anomalies, which watches login/session signals.

anomalies.title: Anomalies
anomalies.description: Scored by a background sweep, newest first.

verify.title: Chain integrity
verify.description: Walk the tenant's hash-chained audit log and confirm no row has been tampered with.

rateLimits.description: Per-endpoint rate limits and per-tenant network policy. Per-tenant / per-user / per-api-key overrides are supported by the API; managing them from this screen is coming soon.

perEndpoint.title: Per-endpoint limits
perEndpoint.description: Built-in token-bucket limits applied at the gateway in platform/ratelimit/limiter.go.

networkPolicy.title: Network policy
networkPolicy.description: Tenant-level IP filtering. Manage in Roles & Permissions → Policies.
networkPolicy.noAllowlist: No allowlist — open to all source IPs.

comingSoon.title: Per-tenant rate-limit controls coming to this screen.
comingSoon.description: The API already supports per-tenant / per-user / per-api-key overrides (migration 0064_rate_limit_overrides); a UI to view and edit them from here is on the way.

bots.description: Detection rules and recent challenges against suspected automated traffic.

rules.title: Detection rules
rules.description: Heuristics evaluated on each authentication attempt. User-Agent fingerprinting is enforced today; the others are stored for upcoming enforcement.
rules.uaCheckHelp: Score known bot UA strings and headless browsers.
rules.honeypotHelp: Hidden form inputs that bots will fill.

logStreaming.description: Stream this tenant's audit events to your SIEM or log platform. New events are forwarded from when a sink is added (no history backfill); delivery is at-least-once.

addSink.title: Add a sink
addSink.description: Splunk HEC (token in the HEC field), Datadog (DD-API-KEY), or a generic HTTP endpoint (optional Bearer token).

sinks.title: Sinks
sinks.description: Toggle a sink to pause/resume forwarding.
sinks.emptyDescription: Add a sink above to start streaming audit events.

anomalies.description: Behavioral anomalies detected across logins, sessions, and API access.

ipAllowlist.description: CIDR ranges that may or may not reach this tenant. Deny rules win over allow rules; if any allow rule exists, an address must match one.
ipAllowlist.disabledBanner: Enforcement is off — these rules are saved but not applied. Toggle it on once you've confirmed your own address is allowed.

quickAdd.title: Quick add
quickAdd.description: Add a CIDR range or a single IP address.

test.title: Test an address
test.description: Evaluate an IP against the current rules before turning enforcement on.
test.ipHelp: Checked exactly as the rules would apply at request time.

rateLimits.description: Configure per-tenant rate limits. Rate is tokens per second; burst is the maximum burst capacity. These override the platform defaults for this tenant.

card.title: Rate Limits
card.description: Limits are enforced per bucket (tenant, user, API key). Burst allows short spikes above the sustained rate.
card.resetConfirmTitle: Reset all rate limits to platform defaults?

tenant.label: Per-tenant
tenant.description: Total requests per second across all users in this tenant.

user.label: Per-user
user.description: Requests per second per individual user account.

apiKey.label: Per-API-key
apiKey.description: Requests per second per API key credential.

riskSettings.description: Configure adaptive MFA. When a login's risk score — bot-likeness, plus impossible-travel and device-reputation if you enable them — exceeds your chosen threshold, MFA is required even on a remembered device.

thresholds.title: Risk Thresholds
thresholds.description: Bot scores range from 0 (clearly human) to 1 (clearly automated). A score above the High threshold forces MFA even on a trusted device.
thresholds.mediumHelp: Score at/above this triggers a step-up MFA challenge for unrecognised devices.
thresholds.highHelp: Score at/above this forces MFA even on a trusted/remembered device.
thresholds.forceAtHelp: Which risk level overrides the trusted-device skip.
thresholds.forceAtMedium: Medium — force on any suspicious request
thresholds.forceAtHigh: High — force only on clearly automated requests

impossibleTravel.title: Impossible travel
impossibleTravel.description: Flag a login from a new country too soon after the last one to be plausible travel. Off by default — also needs a trusted upstream proxy to supply a country header (see docs); with none configured this never fires.

deviceReputation.title: Device reputation
deviceReputation.description: Flag a login from a browser + OS combination never seen before for that user. Off by default.

activity.description: The 20 most recent events across this tenant. Auto-refreshes every 15 seconds. For full filtering and search, head to Audit Logs.
activity.empty: No recent activity in this tenant yet.
